text.title: Definition of Done — Multi-Role Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: inventory-roles
step.action: List roles that touch each lifecycle stage.

step.name: draft-criteria
step.action: For each role, write 3-5 binary criteria.

step.name: assign-owners
step.action: Name an owner per row; reject '@team'.

step.name: wire-evidence-column
step.action: Add evidence column referencing PRs / test reports / docs.
